title: Table Runner - Black Table Runners for Dining Table 33cm x 183cm - 100% Cotton, Durable, and Wrinkle-Resistant Stitching, Ideal for Christmas Party Decoration
features: Premium Quality 100% Cotton – Crafted from soft, breathable cotton that’s both durable and wrinkle-resistant, adding elegance and functionality to your dining space.
Generous Size – Measuring 33 cm x 183 cm, this table runner is perfect for medium to large dining tables, offering elegant coverage and style.

Perfect for All Seasons – A versatile table decoration for year-round use — ideal for long dining tables, kitchen tables, or restaurant setups. Perfect for Christmas parties, weddings, festive scene arrangements, and everyday home decor.
Coordinated Look – Pairs beautifully with a variety of table settings, centerpieces, and placemats, making it easy to create a harmonious and inviting dining setup.
Easy Care – Machine washable and easy to maintain, so it stays looking fresh and stylish for every occasion without hassle.
